title: Monster Beverage: The Energy Behind A 500% Surge And Counting

title: Better Buy: Coca-Cola vs. Monster Beverage
text: Two beverage giants are treading diverging paths, one on a soaring growth trajectory and the other offering stable dividends. Choosing between the two boils down to your investment style: quick growth or steady income.
